comment: Apr 30: General manager Jeff Pagliocca said Thursday that Stevens (knee) has resumed full basketball activities and is "hopefully a few weeks away" from returning to game action, Jack Maloney of CBS Sports reports.
May 6: James has a sprained ankle and was unable to practice Wednesday, Grant Afseth of Dallas Hoops Journal reports.
May 6: Smith has been diagnosed with a nasal fracture and was unable to practice Wednesday, Grant Afseth of Dallas Hoops Journal reports.
May 5: Billings (ankle) will be a limited participant at Tuesday's practice, Chloe Peterson of The Indianapolis Star reports.
May 5: Hull (hamstring) said she expects to play Saturday against the Wings, according to Brian Haenchen of Indy Star Sports.
May 7: Sabally (concussion) is questionable for Friday's game against Washington, Zulfi Sheikh of Sportsnet.ca reports.
